signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely; Strategy Discloses $2
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely; Strategy Discloses $2.54B BTC Buy** | **YES** | **HIGH**  
Bitcoin surged to $77,541 on April 22, 2026 (up 2.2% daily, 4.3% weekly), breaking a two-month consolidation, driven by Trump's indefinite Iran ceasefire extension removing geopolitical risk premium and Strategy's purchase lifting holdings past 815,000 BTC—absorbing ~3x April's global miner supply

signals.headline: Vitalik-Backed Report Projects ETH to $250K by Capturing Gold/BTC Premium** | **YES** | **MED**
signals.raw:
Vitalik-Backed Report Projects ETH to $250K by Capturing Gold/BTC Premium** | **YES** | **MED**  
Etherealize report (April 22, 2026), supported by Vitalik Buterin, forecasts Ethereum hitting $250K via staking, DeFi, and tokenization utility overtaking $31T gold/BTC monetary premium—boosting long-term sentiment amid ETH's $2,260–$2,390 range and 100-day EMA support (~$2,350).[3][2]
